title: Koosalli Water Falls
tagline: Koosalli Water Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: The Koosalli Waterfalls is a large waterfall located in a deep, rocky forest near Koosalli village in Byndoor taluk, Udupi District in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: The Koosalli Waterfalls is a large waterfall located in a deep, rocky forest near Koosalli village in Byndoor taluk, Udupi District in Karnataka, India. Koosalli Waterfalls is a cascading waterfall with six different waterfalls dropping from a height of 470 feet.

topPlaces.name: Sharavathi LTM Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Sharavathi Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected wildlife sanctuary in the Western Ghats of Karnataka state in India. It is named after the Sharavathi River flowing through the sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Hadavalli
topPlaces.description: Hadavalli is a small village, situated about 17 km from Bhatkala in Uttara Kannada district of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Konar (village)
topPlaces.description: Konar is a village in Bhatkal on the western coast of India in the Uttara Kannada district of the state of Karnataka, India. It belongs to the Belegavi division.

items.note: Sharavathi Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected wildlife sanctuary in the Western Ghats of Karnataka state in India. It is named after the Sharavathi River flowing through the sanctuary.
Hadavalli is a small village, situated about 17 km from Bhatkala in Uttara Kannada district of Karnataka, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koosalli Water Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koosalli Water Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koosalli Water Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (123 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koosalli Water Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koosalli Water Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koosalli Water Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Koosalli Water Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koosalli Water Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sharavathi LTM Wildlife Sanctuary, Hadavalli, Konar (village).
